name: diag-sim-controls
description: Enable compute.simulation + open Perf panel + verify sim controls section appears.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const btn = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => /^Perf$/i.test(b.textContent || '')); btn?.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); const controls = window.__qualiaSimulationControls; return { panelOpen: document.querySelectorAll('.perf-panel').length, hasControls: !!controls, tickRate: controls?.getTickRate(), pingMs: controls?.getPingIntervalMs() }; })()
